race.description: Rdo Equipment John Deere Mdn Plate
race.comment: CRYPTION'S DESIRE (3) is close to a win after a string of minor placings, the latest when second over 1950m at Ipswich when he was in the firing line all the way. Finds a perfect assignment and can find winning form. STRIKE ME PINK (10) finished eighth two runs back then improved last start but found a couple better over 1890m at this track, beaten only half a length. Nicely placed to feature in the finish. FOUR DOZEN OYSTERS (1) was in commission last time out but disappointed in finishing fourth over 1890m here, beaten 2 lengths after he got a long way back in the run. Cannot be ruled out in this suitable assignment. FLIRTING WITH FIRE (7) turned in a nice effort last time out at the second run of the campaign and finished just 0.7 lengths from the winner in third over 1625m at this circuit. Nicely placed to take this out.
